decoration: minimal — one or two subtle shapes
hero_layout: scattered — name, title, links placed around the viewport freely
hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
nav_style: inline in hero — no separate nav bar, links inside hero
card_style: hover-to-reveal — minimal at rest, details on hover
scroll_animation: moderate — staggered entrance of cards and elements
border_radius: mixed — sharp sections with rounded cards
color_scheme: mixed — alternating dark and light sections
quirk: section titles are rotated vertically along the left edge
